title: filix-mas augescens var. puberula
intro: Filix-mas augescens var. puberula, also known as the pubescent or hairy horsetail, is a type of plant in the Equisetum family, characterized by its tall, slender stems and feathery foliage. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Filix-mas augescens var. puberula is valued for its diuretic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing blood pressure, alleviating urinary tract infections, and promoting wound healing. Filix-mas augescens var. puberula can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
